defaults.hook_cover_term: a tight close up of Jude Bellingham's face during his arms wide open celebration in a white Real Madrid jersey, his face filling the frame, sharp and clear

videos.video_subject: In his first ever El Clasico, playing away at Barcelona, Jude Bellingham scored a dramatic last minute winner for Real Madrid and celebrated with his iconic arms wide open pose, silencing the home crowd
videos.video_script: Ninety minutes gone at Barcelona's home. Then Bellingham struck the winner and stood arms wide, silencing eighty thousand fans. In his first Clasico, he owned it. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Jude Bellingham arms wide celebration, Jude Bellingham white Real Madrid jersey, Jude Bellingham last minute winner, Jude Bellingham Clasico goal, Jude Bellingham Real Madrid debut, Jude Bellingham screaming celebration close up, Jude Bellingham Bernabeu celebration, Jude Bellingham close up face, Jude Bellingham Real Madrid goal, Jude Bellingham winning goal celebration
